title: Mandala's GUI - Dark mode Advancement Plaques Compat
description: A simple texture pack adding the style of "Mandala's GUI - Dark mode" to the mod "Advancement Plaques"
body:
**👀What it is:**\
A simple texture pack adding the style of "Mandala's GUI - Dark mode" to the mod "Advancement Plaques"

**📜Credits:**\
[Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques) by [Grend_G](https://modrinth.com/user/Grend)\
[Mandala's GUI - Dark mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode) by [Cesar Zorak](https://modrinth.com/user/CesarZorak)

**❤️Support Me:**\
